qualifications.name: Bachelor of Law
notes: Source: RU Ready! Rhodes University Undergraduate Prospectus 2026.
Admission score type: Rhodes points / APS-style score.
No NBT requirement is shown in this table.
The faculty admits a limited number of students directly into LLB1.
Most students who wish to pursue legal studies first register for a general degree in another faculty.
The LLB may be completed as a four-year, two-year, or three-year programme, depending on the route.
